# @tyravel/redis

Redis connection manager for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/redis
```

| Field | Value |

| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/redis`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/redis) |

| Node.js | `>=26` |
